name: codex-claude-bridge
description: Wraps OpenAI Codex (GPT-5.4-class) inside Claude Code as an adversarial reviewer and execution rescue tool. Five slash commands (/codex:setup, /codex:review, /codex:adversarial-review, /codex:rescue, /codex:status) with a hard-coded 7-attack-surface taxonomy and structured-JSON output for closed-loop plan-mode integration.
